name: Raisin Cookie-Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating continuously.
3. Stir in melted butter and vanilla extract.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; mix well into the wet ingredients.
5. Mix in raisins.
6. Spread mixture evenly in a greased 9-inch square pan.
7. Sprinkle top with cinnamon-sugar mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until done. (Do not overbake.)
9. Let cool in the pan.
10. Cut into 24 bars.
